title: Implement and Validate Tradeline Extraction Pipeline with Real-World Test Data

requirements: Validate extraction of 10 core tradeline fields across 20 test records
Support 2 account types: Revolving (16 records) and Installment (4 records)
Handle 2 account statuses: Current (13 records) and Closed (7 records)
Implement field mapping for 3 credit bureaus (TransUnion, Experian, Equifax)
Achieve 98%+ accuracy on critical fields: creditor_name, account_number, account_balance, credit_limit
acceptance: 20 test tradelines successfully extracted: verify by SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tradeline_test = 20
10 fields populated per record: verify creditor_name, account_number, account_type, account_status, account_balance, credit_limit, monthly_payment, date_opened, credit_bureau, is_negative
16 revolving accounts identified: verify by SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tradeline_test WHERE account_type = 'Revolving' = 16
4 installment accounts identified: verify by SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tradeline_test WHERE account_type = 'Installment' = 4
Currency formatting validated: verify all account_balance and credit_limit fields match pattern '^\$[0-9,]+(\.[0-9]{2})?$'
Account number masking applied: verify all account_number fields end with '****'
Date format standardized: verify all date_opened fields match 'MM/DD/YYYY' pattern
13 current accounts flagged: verify by SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tradeline_test WHERE account_status = 'Current' = 13
7 closed accounts flagged: verify by SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tradeline_test WHERE account_status = 'Closed' = 7
Null handling validated: verify monthly_payment and credit_limit allow null values appropriately

artifacts.usage: Ground truth for validation - 20 real-world tradeline records with complete field coverage
artifacts.contains: 16 revolving accounts, 4 installment accounts, 13 current, 7 closed, currency formatting, date patterns, null handling

artifacts.usage: Tradeline schema definition with field types, validation rules, and enums
artifacts.contains: Tradeline dataclass (10 fields), TradelineStatus enum, DocumentType enum, validation schema

artifacts.usage: Field variation mappings for all major credit bureaus with OCR correction patterns
artifacts.contains: 100+ field name variations, METRO2 account codes, OCR correction patterns, fuzzy matching algorithms

artifacts.usage: Main orchestrator for tradeline extraction workflow
artifacts.contains: TradelineExtractionPipeline class, validation, normalization, storage coordination

artifacts.usage: Real-world parser handling messy credit bureau data
artifacts.contains: RealWorldTransUnionParser, pattern matching, error tolerance, multi-line support

artifacts.usage: Pipeline architecture, usage examples, configuration, debugging guides
artifacts.contains: 6-stage pipeline flow, component descriptions, performance targets (98% accuracy)

pre_analysis.action: Load and analyze test data SQL file to understand expected field patterns
Load Tradeline data models to understand schema requirements
Load field mapping utilities for credit bureau variation handling
Analyze real-world parser for pattern extraction logic

implementation_approach.title: Analyze test data patterns and extraction requirements
implementation_approach.description: Parse tradeline_test_rows.sql to identify field patterns, data types, null handling, and validation rules
modification_points: Extract 10 unique field patterns from 20 test records
Identify 4 currency fields requiring $ formatting: account_balance, credit_limit, monthly_payment
Identify 1 date field requiring MM/DD/YYYY parsing: date_opened
Identify 2 categorical fields: account_type (Revolving/Installment), account_status (Current/Closed)
Map 13 creditor patterns: Capital One (5), JPMCB (3), Sunrise Bank (2), others (1 each)
Document null handling rules: monthly_payment (7 nulls), credit_limit (8 nulls), date_opened (1 null)
logic_flow: Parse SQL INSERT statement to extract column names and data types
Group records by account_type: 16 Revolving, 4 Installment
Group records by account_status: 13 Current, 7 Closed
Identify currency formatting patterns: $0, $25, $3,000, $142,000
Identify date formatting patterns: MM/DD/YYYY (12/29/2022, 05/21/2024, etc.)
Identify account number masking pattern: variable length + ****
Calculate field population statistics: which fields allow nulls, which require values
Generate validation rules based on test data patterns

implementation_approach.title: Create extraction validation test suite
implementation_approach.description: Build comprehensive test suite validating extraction accuracy against 20 test records
modification_points: Create 1 new test file: backend/tests/test_tradeline_extraction_validation.py
Implement 10 field-specific validation tests (one per field)
Implement 3 data type validation tests: currency formatting, date parsing, string normalization
Implement 2 business logic tests: account type classification, account status mapping
Implement 1 null handling test: verify optional fields accept nulls
Implement 1 duplicate detection test: verify account_number uniqueness
Add 20 fixture records from tradeline_test_rows.sql
logic_flow: Create pytest fixture loading 20 test records from tradeline_test_rows.sql
Implement test_extract_creditor_name: verify all 20 creditor names extracted correctly
Implement test_extract_account_number: verify masking pattern (****) applied to all 20
Implement test_extract_account_type: verify 16 Revolving, 4 Installment classification
Implement test_extract_account_status: verify 13 Current, 7 Closed mapping
Implement test_extract_account_balance: verify currency formatting ($X,XXX.XX) for all 20
Implement test_extract_credit_limit: verify currency formatting, handle 8 nulls
Implement test_extract_monthly_payment: verify currency formatting, handle 7 nulls
Implement test_extract_date_opened: verify MM/DD/YYYY parsing, handle 1 null
Implement test_extract_credit_bureau: verify all 20 set to 'TransUnion'
Implement test_null_handling: verify optional fields (monthly_payment, credit_limit) accept nulls
Run test suite: pytest backend/tests/test_tradeline_extraction_validation.py -v

implementation_approach.title: Enhance field mapping for test data creditor variations
implementation_approach.description: Update credit_report_field_mappings.py to handle all creditor patterns from test data
modification_points: Add 13 creditor name variations to field mappings
Update account type inference rules for creditor patterns (Capital One → credit_card, MOHELA → student_loan)
Enhance OCR correction patterns for observed field name variations
Add validation rules for currency range ($0 to $142,000 observed)
Add validation rules for date range (2003 to 2024 observed)
logic_flow: Review CreditReportFieldMapper class in credit_report_field_mappings.py
Add creditor-specific account type mappings:
- 'CAPITAL ONE', 'JPMCB CARD SERVICES', 'BANK OF AMERICA', 'CREDIT ONE BANK', 'DISCOVER CARD' → credit_card
- 'MOHELA/DEPT OF ED' → student_loan
- 'LENTEGRITY LLC', 'SCHOOLSFIRST FCU', 'SUNRISE BANK', 'UPSTART' → installment
- 'SYNCB/CARE CREDIT', 'WEBBANK/FINGERHUT', 'SELF FINANCIAL' → revolving/secured
Update _infer_account_type_from_creditor method with new patterns
Test field mapper with all 20 creditor names from test data
Validate account type inference: verify 100% accuracy on test data

implementation_approach.title: Validate pipeline end-to-end with test data
implementation_approach.description: Run full extraction pipeline against test data and verify 98%+ accuracy on critical fields
modification_points: Load 20 test records into tradeline_test table
Run TradelineExtractionPipeline.process_credit_report() for validation
Compare extracted results against expected values from tradeline_test_rows.sql
Generate accuracy report: per-field accuracy, overall accuracy, error analysis
Verify 98%+ accuracy target met on critical fields (creditor_name, account_number, account_balance, credit_limit)
logic_flow: Create test database fixture: execute tradeline_test_rows.sql to populate test table
Initialize TradelineExtractionPipeline with test configuration
For each test record:
- Extract tradeline using pipeline
- Compare extracted values against expected SQL values
- Calculate per-field match percentage
- Log mismatches for error analysis
Aggregate results:
- Calculate overall accuracy: (matched_fields / total_fields) * 100
- Calculate per-field accuracy for 10 fields
- Identify error patterns (OCR issues, formatting, null handling)
Generate validation report:
- Overall accuracy score (target: 98%+)
- Critical field accuracy (creditor_name, account_number, account_balance, credit_limit)
- Per-field accuracy breakdown
- Error analysis with recommended fixes
Assert all acceptance criteria met

modification_points: Update backend/services/tradeline_extraction/README.md with test results
Add section: 'Validated Field Patterns' documenting 10 field extraction patterns
Add section: 'Accuracy Metrics' showing per-field accuracy from validation
Add section: 'Edge Cases Handled' documenting null handling, date variations, currency formatting
Add section: 'Creditor-Specific Patterns' documenting 13 creditor mappings
logic_flow: Read existing README.md structure
Add 'Validated Field Patterns' section after 'Components' section:
